headline_status.current_op: Op 55 — CANONICAL STATE RECONCILIATION (docs/state only): three importer PRs verified INTEGRATED to their mains identity-safe, dual CLEAN, flags default-off, no production enablement/deploy. (1) EXT-C1b PR #6 approved head 55f24d57c625cbd2745ad3fc9226e6d41168d02a → extension main a8a6af6b1b3e4f327e19b823f5258a5e6f2335f1 (parent/rollback 5eabeec0ee53735753059f72581148052c9f2ac4); author+committer Bradley Gleave. (3) Backend PR #508 approved head ab13f49c3d6631c0e922e46b0334770a73bd4b3a → backend main 95e2c6378e0b1b734328a7fdf6b9a6e33465a663 (parent/rollback e6c3082755c89e51c18db9562f84b7b8898ce102); identity-safe squash-equivalent, dual CLEAN, core post-main correctness CI green, flag default-off; build-sbom/release-please failures are pre-existing automation debt (also on prior main), recorded as operational risk — system NOT called fully green. Critical-path nodes for mobile pairing (M2/#285) and backend progress-read (#508) read COMPLETED; next active node = TrueCoach end-to-end vertical proof, then internal cross-browser install/runbook, autonomous site learning, completeness/reconstruction, luxury UI, 3-site/2-browser certification. R3-INC-1 remains OPEN/accepted (ext #5 tip). --- Prior (Op 54): Op 54 — RECONCILE: (a) EXT-C1b PR #6 @55f24d5 dual-lens r2 = CLEAN/CLEAN CONVERGENT (Lens A + Lens B + combined EXT-PR6-R2-LIVE.55f24d5.md, all 0 P0-P3), CI GREEN, R124 both-ways verified — MERGE-READY, identity-safe integration NOW IN PROGRESS (manual squash + lease-safe fast-forward, never GitHub squash, never force-push published main). (b) MOBILE-M2 PR #285 fixer r1 landed @10414c4 (prior builder head bd9a41a): both convergent TEST-ONLY R75 banned-cast P0s swapped for allowed forms + R100 Self-Check heading added to PR body (closes Lens A P3-1); full jest 295 suites/3562 tests, CI + CodeQL green, prod unchanged <=400, ratio>=2 (no test-trimming), R3 clean; dual-lens r2 IN PROGRESS at 10414c4, NOT merge-ready until r2 CLEAN/CLEAN + CI green. H4 decision + R3-INC-1 preserved untouched. --- Op 53 — UPDATE: EXT-C1b PR #6 dual-lens r2 at exact fixer head 55f24d5 (R124 both-ways local==gh headRefOid) = CLEAN/CLEAN, CONVERGENT. Both lenses 0 P0-P3; all six r1 findings root-fixed + independently re-verified by diff inspection; gates independently executed green (check:banned OK, check:loc prod 398/removed 34, check:flags PAIRING_ENABLED sole-auth-path, check:ratio 2.781, vitest 30 files/489 tests exit 0); banned sweep over all added lines NONE; R3 clean on ab5dc61+55f24d5. Reports EXT-PR6-LENS-A-LIVE.55f24d5.md + EXT-PR6-LENS-B-LIVE.55f24d5.md. PR #6 MERGE-READY pending CI-green + R124 re-check; land via identity-safe manual squash + lease-safe fast-forward (never GitHub squash, never force-push published main). Audit read-only (R13) — not merged, not self-approved. --- Prior (builder r1) context: Op 53 — Extension C1b BUILDER COMPLETE: PR #6 OPEN (feat/replay-c1b-wiring, head ab5dc61, base main 5eabeec) wires the merged bounded replay engine (#5) into product runtime — resolver seam (shared/replay/resolve.js), data-only blueprint adapter (extractors/truecoach/blueprint.js), background start_import orchestration, and the Start Import popup CTA. Security controls landed: isTrustedExtensionPage gate (not extension-id alone), synchronous single-flight guard, observed tab-origin injected as allowedOrigins, source bearer end-to-end, source 401/403 -> AuthLostError fails closed WITHOUT clearing TGP tokens. Gates: prod 303/400, test:src ratio 2.010, 467 tests pass, banned clean, R3 clean (author+committer both Bradley Gleave on ab5dc61). Dual-lens r1: LENS A RETURNED = FAIL (P0=0 P1=0 P2=1 P3=2; blocking A-01 = shipping Start Import CTA never supplies sourceToken so a real crawl cannot authenticate against a bearer-gated source — background bearer MANDATE met + e2e-tested, UI token producer missing; P3 A-02 completeIngest lacks res.ok check (pre-existing, reused), P3 A-03 source 5xx low-signal 'import failed'); all MANDATORY controls independently re-verified and HOLD; report handoffs/audit-reports/EXT-PR6-LENS-A-LIVE.ab5dc61.md. LENS B RETURNED = FAIL (P0=0 P1=0 P2=1 P3=3 +1 advisory; blocking PR6-B-P2-cta-omits-source-bearer = the SAME CTA source-bearer gap, independently found — CONVERGENT with Lens A; P3s: partial crawl reported as ingest_succeeded, TGP-side auth loss throws plain Error not AuthLostError (status muddle), single-flight covers start_import only not legacy start_ingest; advisory: ratio 2.010 only 3 lines above the 2.0 floor); all security invariants independently re-verified and HOLD; report handoffs/audit-reports/EXT-PR6-LENS-B-LIVE.ab5dc61.md. Dual-lens r1 = FAIL/FAIL, CONVERGENT on the CTA source-bearer P2. NOT merge-ready — return to fixer for the blocking P2 (plumb the captured source bearer into the CTA, or document+flag the deferral and soften the 'bearer end-to-end' claim) plus the P3 findings, then re-audit BOTH lenses. Merge (only when CLEAN/CLEAN + CI green) via identity-safe manual squash, never GitHub squash. Mobile #284 (M1) already MERGED @1695517 (identity-safe manual squash, R3-conforming). Ext #5 MERGED @5eabeec with R3-INC-1 (GitHub-synthesized identity) OPEN/accepted/grandfathered — not rewritten, not hidden.

product_model.identity: SITE-AGNOSTIC autonomous data bridge. Coach picks prior service in TGP mobile → browser opens that site → after coach login, extension prompts Start client Import? → extension autonomously flips through many pages capturing JSON → posts to TGP scout ingest. Extension ships with the app by default.
product_model.not_this: Not a thin v0.1 TrueCoach-only stub. Not per-site hard-mapped tooling as the product core. Not server-side credential scraping.
product_model.launch_bar: v0.3 — full autonomous multi-page import loop. No half-launch.
flow: 1. User downloads TGP (extension included by default with the app)
4. Opens that site in browser; coach logs in with their own session
5. TGP extension popup: Start client Import?
6. Autonomous multi-page crawl — extension flips through pages and captures JSON as it loads
7. Envelopes to /api/scout/ingest; progress to mobile; complete settles import

product_mission_correction_2026_07_15.op_label: Op 54 — canonical product-mission correction under R5
product_mission_correction_2026_07_15.operator_quote_verbatim: WRONG - your building a site agnsotics, ultra easy to use, browser agnostic tool that can seamlessly and autonymously pull ALL data from any comeptitors site - send to TGP Database, and be reconstructed to our set values instantly with a luxury UI while doing so!
product_mission_correction_2026_07_15.quote_handling: Preserved byte-for-byte (including original spelling) at the top of the durable record per R5. Do NOT paraphrase or 'correct' the quote.
product_mission_correction_2026_07_15.what_it_fixes: Prior canonical wording (chiefly roadmap/M-IMPORTER-EXTENSION_v1.md as originally written) mistook TrueCoach v0.3 for the overall product and implied Chrome-only + a per-competitor mapped-extractor treadmill. That framing is WRONG. TrueCoach on Chrome is the FIRST proving adapter / vertical slice only.
product_mission_correction_2026_07_15.mission: Site-agnostic, browser-agnostic acquisition; autonomous learning/blueprint induction across competitor sites; extraction of ALL user-authorized accessible data; completeness/accounting so omissions are explicit; normalization into one canonical TGP import envelope; deterministic reconstruction into TGP's defined entities/values; idempotent replay; honest progress/partial/failure reporting; and an ultra-easy restrained-luxury UI.
legal_security_invariants: No credential storage on TGP servers
No bypass of source access controls (safe methods only; ride the session, never break it)
Fail closed on ambiguous mappings (never guess a value)
Never claim inaccessible data was imported (honest accounting by construction)
Source bearer in-memory single-run only; never DOM/telemetry/storage/logs/PR/payload
SSRF confinement via allowedOrigins normalized before any fetch

five_distinctions.mission: North star (site-agnostic + browser-agnostic + autonomous + deterministic reconstruction + luxury UI). Never a single PR.
five_distinctions.first_proof: TrueCoach on a Chrome MV3 host — one site + one browser host proving the whole pipeline end-to-end. A vertical slice, not the product boundary.
five_distinctions.current_state: The live PRs in this snapshot (EXT-C1b PR #6 @55f24d5 merge-ready; Mobile M2 PR #285 @10414c4 dual-lens r2 in progress) — unchanged and authoritative.
five_distinctions.v0_3_completion: Full autonomous multi-page import loop for the first proof, default-flagged, honestly reported, packaged, staging E2E green, R137 postmortem. Does NOT require a 2nd site, 2nd browser, or auto-induction. Current launch bar ('v0.3 or no launch').
five_distinctions.v1_0_acceptance: Mission made testable: >=3 sites, >=2 browser hosts on the same kernel, autonomous blueprint induction for an unseen site, completeness/reconciliation accounting, deterministic + idempotent reconstruction, honest partial/failure reporting, luxury UI passes R1 crit, all §2 invariants hold under adversarial audit.

pr_graph_workstreams: WS1 extension core/runtime (background.js, popup/*.js, shared/replay/*, content/main.js)
WS2 browser portability (NEW host/ adapter layer; engine.js read-only)
WS4 canonical mapping/reconstruction (backend reconstruct* + idempotent upsert + reconciliation report)
WS6 luxury UI (mobile import/pairing/progress/review screens; extension popup HTML/CSS only)
product_mission_correction_2026_07_15.decision: Split mission from build-plan (Option C): new canonical mission doc + verbatim quote; demote M-IMPORTER-EXTENSION_v1.md to first-vertical-slice build-plan (subordinate on framing); reconcile state + handoff wording; add the six-workstream PR graph. Documentation only — no product code changed. Reversible by reverting the commit.
product_mission_correction_2026_07_15.audit_exempt: Documentation-only context-repo commit — no R14 code audit required (R14 scope).

immutable_doctrine_in_force.R3_authorship: Every commit shows Bradley Gleave <bradley@bradleytgpcoaching.com> as author AND committer.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R3_CLARIFY_1_2026_07_06: R3 forbidden-token scan uses word-boundary anchored patterns only.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R14_R15_no_merge_without_clean: No PR merges until CLEAN of P0-P3.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R72_dual_lens: All P0-P3 PRs require parallel dual-lens adversarial review before merge.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R80_envelope_source_of_truth: extractors/_interface.js entity envelope is source of truth; backend DTOs MUST match. Capture path is site-agnostic; platform extractors are optional specialization, not the product.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R124_sha_verify_both_ways: gh api head.sha MUST match local git rev-parse HEAD before merge.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R138_autonomy: Agent may squash-merge after dual-lens CLEAN + CI green without human approval.

r3_process_incidents.summary: PR #5 was landed via GitHub-generated squash merge. GitHub synthesized the merge commit identity: author BradleyGleavePortfolio <bradleyapple1031@gmail.com>, committer GitHub <noreply@github.com>. This does NOT satisfy R3 (both author AND committer must be Bradley Gleave <bradley@bradleytgpcoaching.com>).
r3_process_incidents.product_tree_status: ACCEPTED — audited tree at 5d46a1b is CLEAN/CLEAN; only the commit-envelope identity metadata is non-conforming.
r3_process_incidents.remediation_considered: A metadata-only rewrite candidate (byte-identical tree/parent/message/dates, identity corrected to Bradley Gleave) was built and fully verified locally.
r3_process_incidents.remediation_decision: NOT PUSHED. Force-pushing a rewrite over already-published shared main is a destructive provenance-altering operation and was deliberately declined. origin/main remains 5eabeec (unchanged). The candidate object is unreferenced and will be garbage-collected.
r3_process_incidents.honesty_note: This incident is recorded as an OPEN, ACCEPTED landmine. It is NOT hidden and NOT silently fixed. The published 5eabeec commit retains its GitHub-synthesized identity.
r3_process_incidents.prospective_fix: See merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14 — future TGP merges use a manual identity-safe squash so R3 identity is correct at creation time, never requiring a published-history rewrite.

merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.trigger: R3-INC-1 — GitHub-generated squash stamps a non-Bradley author/committer identity that R3 forbids, and correcting it after publish would require a destructive force-push over shared main.
merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.old_procedure: Agent used GitHub squash-merge (UI/API) after dual-lens CLEAN + CI green (R138).
merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.new_procedure: Do NOT use GitHub-generated squash for future TGP merges. Instead: (1) build a local/manual squash commit whose tree is exactly the audited exact-head tree, with BOTH author and committer set to Bradley Gleave <bradley@bradleytgpcoaching.com>; (2) lease-safe fast-forward main to that commit (--force-with-lease pinned to the known base, aborts on divergence — fast-forward only, no history rewrite); (3) close the PR referencing the landed commit.
merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.scope: Applies to extension, backend, and mobile TGP repos going forward. Prior grandfathered history (including 5eabeec) is NOT rewritten.
merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14.supersedes_note: Refines R138 autonomy: merge remains agent-permitted after dual-lens CLEAN + CI green, but the mechanism changes from GitHub squash to identity-safe manual squash + lease-safe fast-forward.

audit_rounds.head: ab5dc61
audit_rounds.lens_b: FAIL P0=0 P1=0 P2=1 P3=3 (+1 advisory)
audit_rounds.gate_local: prod 303/400, test:src ratio 2.010, 467 tests, banned clean, R3 clean
audit_rounds.lens_a_findings: All MANDATORY controls independently re-verified and HOLD (trust gate rejects content-script sender; synchronous single-flight; tab-origin allowedOrigins enforced by normalizeBlueprint inside runReplay BEFORE any fetch; source 401/403 AuthLostError fails closed without clearing TGP tokens; bearer threaded at orchestration layer). BLOCKING A-01 (P2): shipping Start Import CTA never supplies sourceToken (requestStartImport sends only {kind,url}), so makeSourceFetch('') emits no Authorization header and a real CTA-initiated crawl cannot authenticate against a bearer-gated source — the PR-C1b bearer MANDATE is met at the background layer (e2e-tested with injected token) but the UI token producer is missing; either plumb the captured source bearer into the CTA or document+flag the deferral. A-02 (P3): completeIngest (pre-existing, now in success-path blast radius) does not check res.ok, so a non-2xx complete still broadcasts ingest_succeeded. A-03 (P3): source 5xx surfaces as low-signal 'import failed' (status code dropped); credentials:'include' is intended session reuse bounded by allowedOrigins (informational).
audit_rounds.lens_b_findings: Independent read-only lens; did NOT read Lens A. All security invariants independently re-verified PASS (trusted-page gate requires id + no-tab + chrome-extension URL, rejects content-script sender; SSRF confined by REQUIRED allowedOrigins normalized before any fetch + HARDCODED apiBase so a look-alike host cannot swap origin, root-relative templates; synchronous single-flight in the router; source AuthLostError never calls clearTokens(); LOCKED camelCase envelope; data-only blueprint fresh per resolve). BLOCKING PR6-B-P2-cta-omits-source-bearer (P2): the sole production producer of start_import (popup.js:74) sends {kind,url} with NO sourceToken, so makeSourceFetch('') emits no Authorization header and a real CTA click against the sole registered platform (bearer-gated TrueCoach) 401s -> AuthLostError -> imports nothing; the 'bearer end-to-end' claim is proven only under test injection. Fails closed (honest) => P2 not P1. INDEPENDENTLY CONVERGENT with Lens A A-01. P3s: (1) partial-reported-as-succeeded — handleStartImport collapses result.status complete||partial both to ingest_succeeded, discarding the engine's honest partial/degraded/truncated signal (silent data loss shown as unqualified success); (2) tgp-authloss-status-muddle — makeSender throws plain Error('auth_required') not AuthLostError, so a TGP-side auth loss lands in the catch as detail 'auth_required' and overwrites the friendlier onAuthLost broadcast in an order-dependent way; (3) single-flight-only-start_import — importInFlight guards start_import only, not the legacy start_ingest path, so start_ingest can run concurrently. ADVISORY (not scored): ratio 2.010 sits only 3 lines above the R74 floor of 2.0 — a fixer round must not trim tests / add trivial prod. R3 clean at ab5dc61 (author+committer Bradley Gleave, no AI/co-author/noreply trailers).
audit_rounds.note: Builder complete (resolver seam + data-only blueprint adapter + background start_import orchestration + Start Import popup CTA; security controls isTrustedExtensionPage gate / single-flight / tab-origin allowedOrigins / bearer end-to-end / AuthLostError 401/403 no-token-clear). Dual-lens r1 RETURNED = FAIL/FAIL, CONVERGENT on the CTA source-bearer P2 (Lens A A-01 == Lens B PR6-B-P2, independently found). All MANDATORY security invariants HOLD by both lenses (no P0/P1). NOT merge-ready — return to fixer for the blocking CTA source-bearer P2 (plumb the captured source bearer into the CTA message, OR document+flag the deferral and soften the 'bearer end-to-end' PR claim), plus the P3s (Lens A: completeIngest res.ok, source-5xx signal; Lens B: partial->succeeded fidelity, TGP-authloss classification, single-flight scope), then re-audit BOTH lenses at the new exact fixer head. On CLEAN/CLEAN + CI green, land via identity-safe manual squash (never GitHub squash). RESOLUTION: fixer r1 landed @55f24d5 (all six root-fixed + adversarial tests); dual-lens r2 PENDING at that head.

audit_rounds.head: 55f24d5
audit_rounds.standard: full angry adversarial ANY P0-P3, dual-lens, at the exact fixer head (R124 both-ways local==gh headRefOid==55f24d5)
audit_rounds.gate_local: gates independently executed at 55f24d5 (clean node_modules): check:banned OK (source patterns + R3 identity); check:loc prod_added=398 prod_removed=34 cap=600 OK; check:flags PAIRING_ENABLED=true sole-auth-path OK; check:ratio prod 398/test 1107 = 2.781 floor 2 OK; npm test (vitest) 30 files / 489 tests pass exit 0. Banned sweep over ALL added lines (prod+test) = NONE (the two .catch(()=>undefined) are project-doctrine-exempt best-effort broadcasts, gate-clean). R3 clean on both branch commits ab5dc61+55f24d5.
audit_rounds.findings: Zero P0-P3 in either lens. All six r1 findings root-fixed and re-verified by direct diff inspection at 55f24d5: (r1-P2 CTA source-bearer) collectSourceToken(tabId, allowedOrigins) re-reads live tab origin + requires it in allowlist + queries trusted content collector (wireCollector sender.id gate), accepts only {ok:true,token}, token memory-only (never DOM/storage/logs/telemetry/PR/payload), fails closed on nav/missing script; (r1-P3) completeIngest throws complete N on non-2xx + complete_timeout on bounded timeout; (r1-P3) engine lastSkipStatus preserves status-number/category only (no body/PII) surfaced via failDetail/partialDetail; (r1-P3) partial maps to distinct ingest_partial (amber), not ingest_succeeded; (r1-P3) TGP double-401 -> tgpAuthLost+clearTokens (pairing) vs SOURCE 401/403 -> AuthLostError WITHOUT clearTokens (source re-login) — two distinct fail-closed paths; (r1-P3) importInFlight set synchronously in router, shared across start_import + legacy start_ingest. SSRF confined by REQUIRED https allowedOrigins; sender trust via isTrustedExtensionPage (id + extension-origin URL + no tab); fresh blueprint per run; VERBATIM entity envelope.
audit_rounds.note: Dual-lens r2 RETURNED = CLEAN/CLEAN, CONVERGENT at exact fixer head 55f24d5. R14 axis met on both lenses. MERGE-READY pending CI-green + R124 re-check at merge time. Land via identity-safe manual squash + lease-safe fast-forward (merge_procedure_change_2026_07_14) — NEVER GitHub squash, NEVER force-push published main. Audit was read-only (R13); not merged, not self-approved. R3-INC-1 on ext main tip 5eabeec remains OPEN/accepted/grandfathered (untouched).

truth_boundaries.ingestion_is_not_reconstruction: Ingestion/staging (ScoutIngestEntity writes + counts) is NOT canonical reconstruction into TGP entities. Backend status counts raw staged rows only.
truth_boundaries.no_e2e_proof_yet: No certified end-to-end run proves source discovery -> canonical TGP reconstruction -> review. Do not infer or claim completion.
truth_boundaries.staging_vs_canonical: Staging evidence is not canonical reconstruction evidence. Completion must satisfy staged = reconstructed + skipped + failed by family, with reasons.
truth_boundaries.no_truecoach_mapper: Backend has no TrueCoach mapper; 'truecoach' is only a pairing slug. Mobile 'paired' is a dead-end with no honest PROGRESS/REVIEW/COMPLETION.

order: PR-C1c (extension replay contract parity + real fixture e2e + icon)
IMPORTER-F (backend first client-only reconstruction; blocked on D1 golden fixture + D2 canonical target)
PR-M3 (mobile honest review handoff; blocked on authoritative roster materialization)
next_pr_order.rule: PR-C1c FIRST; then resolve backend D1/D2 and implement client reconstruction; then mobile review handoff ONLY after authoritative roster materialization. Do not reorder.

blockers.IMPORTER-F.D1: Commit a golden real TrueCoach client payload fixture from the extension (produced by PR-C1c).
blockers.IMPORTER-F.D2: Decide canonical client target. Default recommendation: invite-pending roster shell, NOT full auth User (avoid identity collision/provisioning risk).
blockers.PR-M3.precondition: Verify reconstructed TrueCoach clients materialize in the exact coach roster read by /v1/coach/me/clients, OR intentionally consume a coach-scoped mobile status contract. If neither, do not build.
